$comment: Tend screenshot traversal + Tier-2 outcome assertions. Generates qa/flows/mobile.yaml (scripts/qa/compile-flow.mjs); never hand-edit the yaml. Anchors live in qa/selectors.json and target the seeded people (src/qa/fixtures.ts). The reach-out assertion pins the core action: logging contact flips the seeded person's status to 'Reached out today' (assertNot -> assert).
